title: AI Caveman
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a prehistoric portrait.
positive_prompt: Prehistoric caveman portrait, ancient human warrior, realistic stone age clothing, rugged appearance, natural environment, primitive tools, cinematic lighting, authentic prehistoric atmosphere, highly detailed facial features, realistic skin texture, survivalist character, epic historical scene, photorealistic, ultra detailed, sharp focus, documentary-quality realism
negative_prompt: modern clothing, futuristic elements, cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, sci-fi technology, modern city, unrealistic proportions, noise, pixelation, cropped body, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. stone age hunter, cave firelight...
